info.name: Distributed HRM - Full API Collection
info.description: Collection bao quat Publisher (6.1), Node (6.2), Sync (6.3), Auth va test sync 2 chieu cho Node HCM + Node HN.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Dang nhap va luu token cho cac request khac.

request.description: Dang nhap vao Publisher. Neu API tra ve token, script se luu vao bien {{token}}.
Lay danh sach loai hop dong.
Tao tai khoan va gan role/chi nhanh.
Publisher tiep nhan du lieu tu node.
Tra cuu nhan su toan cong ty.
Bao cao tong hop toan he thong.
Tao nhan vien tai node HCM.
Tao hop dong tai node HCM.
Bao cao cuc bo node HCM.

exec: pm.test('Co 3 nhom du lieu', function(){ pm.expect(d).to.have.property('employees'); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('attendance'); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('payroll'); });

item.name: Node HN
item.description: Endpoint Node HN (6.2) - bo request tuong tu HCM de test node thu 2.

request.description: Tao nhan vien tai node HN.
Tao hop dong tai node HN.
Bao cao cuc bo node HN.

item.name: Sync
item.description: Kich ban dong bo 2 chieu giua Publisher va 2 Node.

request.description: Day thay doi tu Node HCM len Publisher.

exec: pm.test('Co thong ke sync', function(){ pm.expect(d).to.have.property('total'); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('synced'); });

request.description: Keo du lieu master tu Publisher ve Node HCM.
Day thay doi tu Node HN len Publisher.
Keo du lieu master tu Publisher ve Node HN.
Theo doi trang thai dong bo cua node HCM va HN tu Publisher.
